shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The Easter Bunny is making the rounds on the rails before hopping to it next weekend. It's a busy weekend for the bunny at the Electric City Trolley Station and Museum. Families were able to take a train ride with the beloved figure both Saturday and Sunday. Organizers packed the [...]
shorts.content: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — The Easter Bunny is making the rounds on the rails before hopping to it next weekend. It's a busy weekend for the bunny at the Electric City Trolley Station and Museum. Families were able to take a train ride with the beloved figure both Saturday and Sunday. shorts.title: PennDOT schedules multiple restrictions for I-81, I-80
shorts.title_distilled: PennDOT schedules multiple restrictions for I-81, I-80.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — There will be several lane restrictions and closures beginning Monday on Interstates 81 and 80 in Lackawanna and Luzerne counties, according to the Pennsylvania Department of Transpor...
shorts.content: (WBRE/WYOU) — There will be several lane restrictions and closures beginning Monday on Interstates 81 and 80 in Lackawanna and Luzerne counties, according to the Pennsylvania Department of Transpor...
